title: PerturBench: Benchmarking Machine Learning Models for Cellular Perturbation Analysis

data.name: Processed PerturBench datasets
data.reason: Processed h5ad datasets may be large; fetch explicitly when reproducing.

original_evaluation: Metrics and failure-mode analysis for cellular perturbation models
core_generalization_finding: Perturbation-response models need task designs that mirror deployment settings with unobserved perturbation effects.
spectra_demo_hook: Extend PerturBench tasks with automatic spectral audits across perturbation and covariate novelty.

recommended_novelty_axes.name: unseen_perturbation_distance
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: gene, drug, or perturbation embedding distance

recommended_novelty_axes.name: cell_type_distance
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: distance between cell-state or cell-type embeddings

recommended_novelty_axes.name: perturbation_ontology_distance
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: distance in perturbation ontology or pathway annotations

recommended_novelty_axes.name: combinatorial_novelty
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: overlap between train/test single and combination perturbation components
